# Zero-to-CAD 1M Zero-to-CAD is a large-scale dataset of 1,000,000 executable CAD construction sequences generated by an LLM operating inside a feedback...

**@Jousef Murad** · 2026-05-08 08:29

Zero-to-CAD 1M

Zero-to-CAD is a large-scale dataset of 1,000,000 executable CAD construction sequences generated by an LLM operating inside a feedback-driven CAD environment.

Datasets: https://huggingface.co/datasets/ADSKAILab/Zero-To-CAD-1m

Paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.24479
